title: StablecoinVaultSimulator Deployment Metadata v1
description: Versioned static metadata for a StablecoinVaultSimulator deployment. All contract address fields MUST be null/omitted until an actual deployment has been performed and the transaction confirmed on-chain. The WalletWall app may consume this file read-only; it MUST NOT infer transaction readiness, vault availability, or custody from the presence or absence of this file.

version.description: Schema version for this metadata file. Currently '1'.

environment.description: Deployment environment. 'local' means an in-memory Hardhat or Anvil node (no persistent deployment record needed). 'sepolia' and 'base-sepolia' are public testnets only.

chainId.description: EVM chain ID. 31337 = Hardhat/Anvil local; 11155111 = Ethereum Sepolia; 84532 = Base Sepolia.

networkName.description: Human-readable network name matching the Hardhat network key (e.g. 'hardhat', 'localhost', 'sepolia', 'base-sepolia').

tokenMode.description: 'mock' = MockUSDC (freely mintable, no monetary value, deployed alongside the simulator). 'external-test-token' = a pre-existing testnet ERC-20 not deployed by this repo's scripts.

tokenAddress.description: Address of the ERC-20 token contract used by this simulator deployment. MUST be null until deployed and the transaction confirmed on-chain. Never a real-value token address.

tokenSymbol.description: Symbol of the deployed token (e.g. 'mUSDC'). May be populated before deployment as documentation; must match the deployed token when an address is present.

tokenDecimals.description: Decimal precision of the token. MockUSDC uses 6 to mirror real USDC.

stablecoinVaultSimulatorAddress.description: Address of the deployed StablecoinVaultSimulator contract. MUST be null until deployed and confirmed on-chain.

verifierAddress.description: Address of the deployed IPQCVerifier contract (MockMLDSAVerifier locally, AttestationPQCVerifier on testnets). MUST be null until deployed.

policyEngineAddress.description: Address of the deployed IPolicyEngine contract, if one was wired at construction. Null if the simulator was deployed without a policy engine.

timelockAddress.description: Timelock admin address used for large-tx and governance delays. Null until deployed or if the deployer address acts as admin.

recoveryAddress.description: Guardian recovery address. Null until deployed or if recovery was not configured.

deploymentCommit.description: Full 40-character git commit SHA of the source tree from which this deployment was compiled. MUST be null until deployed. Must match a commit present in the public repository.

packageVersion.description: package.json version of this repository at deployment time (semver). Documents which release built the deployed bytecode.

deployedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the deployment transaction was confirmed. MUST be null until deployed.

docsUrl.description: URL to the primary documentation for this deployment (e.g. docs/specs/testnet-stablecoin-vault-simulator.md on GitHub). Read-only reference for the app.

warnings.description: Required disclosure strings. Must contain at least one entry stating that this is a testnet-only research prototype with no monetary value. The app must surface at least one of these to the user before any write interaction.
